name: Planoly Visual Instagram Planning API
what_it_does: Planoly visual social media planning REST API for creators, brands, and small businesses to plan, schedule, and publish Instagram, Pinterest, TikTok, Twitter, and Facebook content with visual grid preview and hashtag management. Enables AI agents to manage visual content calendar and drag-drop grid planning for Instagram aesthetic automation, handle auto-publish and first comment scheduling for Instagram content automation, access Pinterest pin scheduling and board management for Pinterest marketing automation, retrieve hashtag research and performance analytics for hashtag strategy automation, manage multi-channel content repurposing and cross-posting for content workflow automation, handle Canva integration and media library for asset management automation, access analytics and post performance tracking for content optimization automation, retrieve Linkit page (link-in-bio) management for traffic attribution automation, manage collaborator and approval workflow for small team content review automation, and integrate Planoly with Canva, Shopify, and creative platforms for end-to-end visual social content workflow.
use_cases: Planning Instagram grids from visual aesthetic automation agents
Scheduling Pinterest pins from content marketing agents
Managing hashtag strategy from content optimization agents
Cross-posting content from multi-platform scheduling agents
not_for: Enterprise social media management with complex team workflows (use Sprout Social or Hootsuite)
Deep competitive analytics and benchmarking (use Iconosquare or Rival IQ)
Social customer care and inbox management
best_when: A creator, small brand, or solo marketer wanting AI agents to automate visual Instagram grid planning, Pinterest scheduling, hashtag management, and cross-platform content publishing through Planoly's visual-first social platform.
avoid_when: PLATFORM API DEPENDENCY FOR AUTO-PUBLISH: Planoly auto-publish relies on Instagram/Pinterest API permissions; auto-publish availability depends on account type (Business/Creator for Instagram) and current platform API policy; automated publishing workflows must verify auto-publish eligibility before scheduling; unsupported account types require push notification publish with manual action. PLANOLY SMB SCALE LIMITATION FOR ENTERPRISE WORKFLOWS: Planoly is designed for individual creators and small businesses; enterprise-scale multi-brand, multi-account publishing workflows exceed Planoly's designed use case; automated enterprise workflows managing 10+ brands or accounts should evaluate Hootsuite or Sprout Social instead. LINKIT vs LINKIN.BIO COMPETITOR ECOSYSTEM: Planoly's link-in-bio (Linkit) competes with Later's Linkin.bio and Linktree; automated traffic attribution workflows standardized on one link-in-bio provider create migration effort when switching social tools; evaluate long-term platform commitment before automating link-in-bio management.

auth.notes: Planoly uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. REST API with JSON. Houston, Texas HQ. Founded 2016 by Brandy Pham. Bootstrapped, profitable. Acquired by Tailwind in 2022. Products: Instagram grid planner, auto-publish, Pinterest scheduler, TikTok planner, hashtag management, Linkit (link-in-bio), analytics. Platforms: Instagram, Pinterest, TikTok, Twitter, Facebook. GDPR. Serves 8M+ creators and brands. Competes with Later, Loomly, and Buffer for visual social scheduling.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free Solo plan (1 user, 1 social set, 30 posts/month)
pricing.paid_tiers: Solo (free), Duo ($13/mo), Custom ($23/mo); annual discount available
pricing.notes: Houston TX. Tailwind subsidiary (acquired 2022). Free Solo + paid tiers. No credit card for free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; scheduling and media queries throttled; no webhooks — polling for status

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — PUSH NOTIFICATION OR POLLING ONLY: Planoly does not provide webhooks for publishing events; automated publishing workflows cannot receive push notification of successful auto-publish; automated confirmation of published post requires polling or Instagram Graph API direct check after scheduled publish time

TAILWIND ACQUISITION INTEGRATION EVOLUTION: Planoly was acquired by Tailwind (Pinterest scheduler) in 2022; integration between Planoly and Tailwind product lines is evolving; automated workflows built on separate Planoly and Tailwind APIs must monitor for unified platform migration that could consolidate endpoints

HASHTAG SET MANAGEMENT FOR SCHEDULED POSTS: Planoly supports saved hashtag sets for quick insertion; automated hashtag strategy requires pre-creating hashtag sets via API before scheduling posts that reference them; automated post scheduling with inline hashtags bypasses saved set analytics tracking

PINTEREST AUTO-PUBLISH BOARD TARGETING: Planoly Pinterest scheduling requires explicit board selection; automated Pinterest publishing must specify board ID for each pin; automated content cross-posting to Pinterest without board specification creates unplaced pins that don't reach target audience segments

VISUAL GRID REORDERING API vs DRAG-DROP UI: Planoly's core visual grid planning is optimized for drag-drop UI; grid order management via API requires explicit position specification; automated visual grid management workflows must calculate and specify grid position for each post rather than relying on UI drag-drop interaction
agent_readiness.security_notes: Visual social scheduling. GDPR. OAuth2. US. Social content and publishing data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Social scheduling. GDPR. OAuth2. US. Content and publishing data.
